---
title: "Publications"
subtitle: "Peer-reviewed articles, book chapters, and conference papers"
page-layout: article
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
---

::: {.page-header}
# Publications
Our contributions to geographic science
:::

## Overview

Our team has contributed over **45 peer-reviewed publications** in leading geographic, remote sensing, and geospatial journals. Our work emphasizes the integration of deep learning, machine learning, and GIS with field-validated methodologies. Below is a selection of recent works.

---

## 2026

::: {.pub-item}
::: {.pub-title}
Multi-Temporal Sentinel-2 Analysis for Crop Type Classification Using Ensemble Machine Learning with Field-Validated Training Data
:::
::: {.pub-authors}
[Author A], [Author B], & [Author C]
:::
::: {.pub-journal}
Remote Sensing of Environment [2026]{.pub-year}
:::
::: {.pub-links}
[<i class="fas fa-file-pdf"></i> PDF](#) [<i class="fas fa-link"></i> DOI](#) [<i class="fas fa-code"></i> Code](#)
:::
:::

::: {.pub-item}
::: {.pub-title}
Attention-Based SAR-Optical Fusion Using Deep Learning for Urban Building Footprint Extraction: A GEE and PyTorch Workflow
:::
::: {.pub-authors}
[Author D], [Author E], & [Author C]
:::
::: {.pub-journal}
ISPRS Journal of Photogrammetry and Remote Sensing [2026]{.pub-year}
:::
::: {.pub-links}
[<i class="fas fa-file-pdf"></i> PDF](#) [<i class="fas fa-link"></i> DOI](#)
:::
:::

## 2025

::: {.pub-item}
::: {.pub-title}
Urban Flood Vulnerability Mapping: Integrating QGIS-Based Multi-Criteria Analysis with Random Forest and Ground-Truth Field Surveys
:::
::: {.pub-authors}
[Author F], [Author G], & [Author C]
:::
::: {.pub-journal}
Journal of Hydrology [2025]{.pub-year}
:::
::: {.pub-links}
[<i class="fas fa-file-pdf"></i> PDF](#) [<i class="fas fa-link"></i> DOI](#) [<i class="fas fa-database"></i> Data](#)
:::
:::

::: {.pub-item}
::: {.pub-title}
Vision Transformers for Land Use Classification from Sentinel-2 Imagery: A Comparative Study with Field-Validated Accuracy Assessment
:::
::: {.pub-authors}
[Author D] & [Author C]
:::
::: {.pub-journal}
IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing [2025]{.pub-year}
:::
::: {.pub-links}
[<i class="fas fa-file-pdf"></i> PDF](#) [<i class="fas fa-link"></i> DOI](#) [<i class="fas fa-code"></i> Code](#)
:::
:::

::: {.pub-item}
::: {.pub-title}
Google Earth Engine-Based Land Cover Change Detection (1993–2023): A Random Forest Approach with Sequential Field Validation
:::
::: {.pub-authors}
[Author B], [Author H], & [Author C]
:::
::: {.pub-journal}
Remote Sensing [2025]{.pub-year}
:::
::: {.pub-links}
[<i class="fas fa-file-pdf"></i> PDF](#) [<i class="fas fa-link"></i> DOI](#) [<i class="fas fa-code"></i> GEE Script](#)
:::
:::

::: {.pub-item}
::: {.pub-title}
Spatial Patterns of Urban Heat Island Intensity: MODIS LST Analysis in GEE Validated with Field-Deployed Temperature Sensors
:::
::: {.pub-authors}
[Author G], [Author E], & [Author C]
:::
::: {.pub-journal}
Landscape and Urban Planning [2025]{.pub-year}
:::
::: {.pub-links}
[<i class="fas fa-file-pdf"></i> PDF](#) [<i class="fas fa-link"></i> DOI](#) [<i class="fas fa-database"></i> Data](#)
:::
:::

## 2024

::: {.pub-item}
::: {.pub-title}
Deep Learning for Automated Road Network Extraction from High-Resolution Imagery: U-Net Architecture with QGIS Post-Processing
:::
::: {.pub-authors}
[Author E], [Author D], & [Author C]
:::
::: {.pub-journal}
Computers, Environment and Urban Systems [2024]{.pub-year}
:::
::: {.pub-links}
[<i class="fas fa-file-pdf"></i> PDF](#) [<i class="fas fa-link"></i> DOI](#) [<i class="fas fa-code"></i> Code](#)
:::
:::

::: {.pub-item}
::: {.pub-title}
Geostatistical Analysis of Groundwater Quality Using Kriging in R: Spatial Modeling Validated with Borehole Field Measurements
:::
::: {.pub-authors}
[Author E] & [Author B]
:::
::: {.pub-journal}
Science of the Total Environment [2024]{.pub-year}
:::
::: {.pub-links}
[<i class="fas fa-file-pdf"></i> PDF](#) [<i class="fas fa-link"></i> DOI](#)
:::
:::

::: {.pub-item}
::: {.pub-title}
NDVI Trend Analysis Using Mann-Kendall Test in Python: Spatiotemporal Vegetation Dynamics and Precipitation Correlation in Semi-Arid Regions
:::
::: {.pub-authors}
[Author G] & [Author C]
:::
::: {.pub-journal}
Journal of Arid Environments [2024]{.pub-year}
:::
::: {.pub-links}
[<i class="fas fa-file-pdf"></i> PDF](#) [<i class="fas fa-link"></i> DOI](#) [<i class="fas fa-database"></i> Data](#)
:::
:::

## 2023

::: {.pub-item}
::: {.pub-title}
Transfer Learning for Satellite Image Classification: A Systematic Review and Benchmark of CNN Architectures Using Python
:::
::: {.pub-authors}
[Author D], [Author B], & [Author C]
:::
::: {.pub-journal}
Remote Sensing Reviews [2023]{.pub-year}
:::
::: {.pub-links}
[<i class="fas fa-file-pdf"></i> PDF](#) [<i class="fas fa-link"></i> DOI](#)
:::
:::

::: {.pub-item}
::: {.pub-title}
Network-Based Accessibility Analysis of Healthcare Facilities Using QGIS and Python: A Spatial Equity Perspective
:::
::: {.pub-authors}
[Author E] & [Author F]
:::
::: {.pub-journal}
Applied Geography [2023]{.pub-year}
:::
::: {.pub-links}
[<i class="fas fa-file-pdf"></i> PDF](#) [<i class="fas fa-link"></i> DOI](#) [<i class="fas fa-code"></i> Code](#)
:::
:::

---

## Book Chapters

::: {.pub-item}
::: {.pub-title}
Geospatial Artificial Intelligence: Deep Learning Methods and Applications in Geographic Research
:::
::: {.pub-authors}
[Author C] & [Author D]
:::
::: {.pub-journal}
In: *Advances in Geographic Information Science*, Springer [2024]{.pub-year}
:::
:::

::: {.pub-item}
::: {.pub-title}
Remote Sensing for Environmental Monitoring: From Satellite Imagery to Field Validation
:::
::: {.pub-authors}
[Author B] & [Author G]
:::
::: {.pub-journal}
In: *Handbook of Earth Observation*, Wiley [2023]{.pub-year}
:::
:::

---

## Conference Presentations (Selected)

| Year | Conference | Title |
|:-----|:----------|:------|
| 2026 | EGU General Assembly | GEE-Based Drought Monitoring Using NDVI Anomaly Detection and Field-Measured Soil Moisture |
| 2025 | AAG Annual Meeting | Integrating QGIS Multi-Criteria Analysis with ML for Urban Flood Vulnerability (Best Paper) |
| 2025 | IEEE IGARSS | Self-Supervised Pretraining for Satellite Image Segmentation Using PyTorch |
| 2024 | ISPRS Congress | Automated LULC Classification with Vision Transformers: A Field-Validated Approach |
| 2024 | GIScience Conference | Spatial Prediction of Land Surface Temperature Using XGBoost and GEE |
| 2023 | AGU Fall Meeting | Multi-Temporal Vegetation Dynamics Analysis Using GEE and Mann-Kendall Statistics in R |

---

::: {.info-box}
#### <i class="ai ai-google-scholar"></i> Full Publication List
For a complete list of publications, visit our [Google Scholar](#) or [ResearchGate](#) profiles.
:::
